description_long: This is an adult male figure standing upright, dressed in a short-sleeve, fitted t-shirt and casual pants with a slightly tapered fit. He is holding a wine glass in his right hand, which is clearly visible from the front and side views. His shoes are low-top sneakers, and his overall appearance suggests a relaxed, urban style suitable for city streets or social gatherings. The figure's hair is short and styled with some volume, giving a neat but casual look. The facial features are stylized, and the hands are relaxed at his sides except for the one holding the glass. The clothing fits closely to the body, and there are no visible accessories apart from the wine glass.
description: A casually dressed adult male standing upright, holding a wine glass in one hand, with short styled hair and sneakers.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, t-shirt, pants, sneakers, and the wine glass held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the arm holding the wine glass, and the side seam of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, t-shirt, pants, and both shoes, with the wine glass partially visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the opposite profile, relaxed left arm, and the wine glass held away from the body.
